BUG: Pin name typo — using "D0" (digit zero) instead of "DO" (letter O). This will capture data on pin "D0", but later we try to read from "DO".  Later, we attempt to retrieve the captured vector from pin "DO" (letter O). Because the capture used "D0", this lookup will not match and may return empty or error.
